title: Will Mike Mazzei be the Republican nominee for Governor in Oklahoma?

current.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 79%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: Polling leader (~23-24%) in a 5-way race headed to an Aug 25 runoff; Trump's May 29 endorsement is the dominant signal in OK GOP primaries and his $10.9M self-funding leads the ad war. Market (0.805) ~ my estimate, so no edge.

history.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 78%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: Trump endorsed Mazzei (May 29) in a Trump-loyal state, but a 9-way field makes an outright June 16 win unlikely and likely forces an Aug 25 runoff — which sits awkwardly against this market's June-30 settlement. Treating it as eventual-nomination, ~78%; flagged low conviction for the resolution-timing ambiguity.
key_drivers: June-30 settlement vs Aug runoff ambiguity
